response.text:

rationale: Your SoC (42%) is below our minimum sharing threshold (50%), and our microgrid is in cascading depletion with zero surplus capacity—self-preservation and grid stability require we retain all available energy until our own SoC recovers.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
